chains.display_name: WD78 Welded Steel Drag Chain (No Rollers)
chains.description: WD78 welded steel drag chain — 3.075" pitch, barrel-only (no rollers). Simpler and lower cost than WR78. Used in light bulk drag applications where sliding friction is acceptable.

performance_tiers.notes: WD78 — rollerless barrel drag chain, lower cost than WR78.

chains.display_name: WR110 Welded Steel Drag Chain with Rollers
chains.description: WR110 heavy welded steel drag chain — 4.76" pitch with rollers. High-capacity grain, coal, and phosphate drag conveyor applications.

chains.display_name: WR124 Welded Steel Drag Chain with Rollers
chains.description: WR124 welded steel drag chain — 4.063" pitch, roller type. Heavy-duty grain elevator legs, potash, and coal drag conveyor applications.

chains.display_name: WR78 Welded Steel Drag Chain with Rollers
chains.description: WR78 welded steel drag chain — 3.075" pitch, with rollers for reduced friction on drag conveyor troughs. Used in fertilizer, grain, limestone, and agricultural en-masse systems.

performance_tiers.notes: WR78 welded roller drag chain. Rollers reduce sliding friction on drag trough floor.

chains.description: Donghua 102B welded steel bushed chain — 4" pitch. Barrel-and-sidebar welded construction for bulk material elevators and drag conveyors.
Donghua 132B welded steel bushed chain — 5.2" pitch. Heavy welded construction for high-load bulk material elevator and drag applications.
Donghua 160B heavy welded steel chain — 6.3" pitch. For maximum capacity grain elevators and aggregate drag conveyors.

performance_tiers.notes: 160B — largest standard welded steel pitch in DH catalog.

chains.description: WH106 heavy welded steel mill chain for grain elevators and heavy bulk material handling.

chains.display_name: WH106HD Heavy Duty Welded Steel Chain
chains.description: WH106HD — same pitch as WH106 with extended bearing length (3.00") for higher load rating.

chains.display_name: WH106XHD Extra Heavy Welded Steel Chain
chains.description: WH106XHD extra heavy-duty — 1.00" rivet, 2.00" sidebar, 1.62" barrel. Maximum capacity 6" pitch welded mill chain.

performance_tiers.notes: XHD construction — confirmed from Allied-Locke live catalog.

chains.description: WH110 welded steel mill chain — same pitch as WH106 but wider sprocket face (1.88") for broader conveyor applications.
WH111 welded steel mill chain — 4.76" pitch, 1.75" sidebar width. Confirmed from Allied-Locke catalog.
Heavy welded steel mill chain. Used in bulk handling and elevator applications requiring higher load capacity.

chains.display_name: WH124HD Heavy Duty Welded Steel Chain
chains.description: WH124HD — extra-heavy 4.063" pitch welded mill chain with 1.00" rivet and 1.62" barrel. High-load grain elevator and aggregate use.

performance_tiers.notes: HD construction — confirmed from Allied-Locke live catalog. Specification varies by manufacturer vs WH124 baseline.

chains.description: WH132 heavy welded steel chain — 2.88" sprocket face for wide-conveyor grain elevator and aggregate applications.

chains.display_name: WH132HD Heavy Duty Welded Steel Chain
chains.description: WH132HD — extended bearing length (4.62") vs WH132 (4.38") for higher load capacity.

performance_tiers.notes: HD construction — confirmed from Allied-Locke live catalog.

chains.description: WH150 heavy-pitch welded steel mill chain for high-load bulk handling applications.

chains.display_name: WH150HD Heavy Duty Welded Steel Chain
chains.description: WH150HD — wide sidebar (2.50") with extended bearing length (4.62"). Higher load than standard WH150.

chains.display_name: WH150XHD Extra Heavy Welded Steel Chain
chains.description: WH150XHD — 1.12" rivet diameter, heaviest sidebar in WH150 series. Maximum working load 18,200 lb.

performance_tiers.notes: XHD construction — confirmed from Allied-Locke live catalog.

chains.description: WH155 — 1.75" barrel diameter, 3.00" sprocket face. Wider than WH150 series for broader conveyor tracks.
WH159 — 2.00" barrel, 3.00" sprocket face, 6.125" pitch. Largest standard WH mill chain in the Allied-Locke catalog. Working load 20,250 lb.
WH188 lighter welded steel mill chain — 0.88" barrel, narrower face than WH78. Used in lighter conveying applications.

performance_tiers.notes: Confirmed — working load 2,850 lb from Allied-Locke live catalog.

chains.description: All-welded steel mill chain with heat-treated components. Used in grain elevators, log handling, and bulk material conveying.

chains.display_name: WH78-4 Extended Pitch Welded Steel Chain
chains.description: WH78 components at 4" extended pitch. Used where wider pitch spacing is required while retaining WH78 sprocket compatibility.

performance_tiers.notes: Extended pitch variant of WH78. Confirmed from Allied-Locke live catalog.

chains.description: WH82 welded steel mill chain — 3.075" pitch, heavier construction than WH78. Confirmed from Allied-Locke catalog.
WH88 welded steel mill chain with barrel diameter 1.000" and heavier construction than WH78.
WR106 welded steel roller chain for bulk handling and log processing.
WR124 heavy welded steel roller chain for high-load conveying applications.
WR150 large-pitch welded steel roller chain for heavy bulk handling.
WR78 welded steel chain with rollers. Roller reduces friction against guide rails in conveyor applications.
WR88 welded steel chain with rollers. Heavier construction than WR78.
